name: ui-uncontrolled-battle-board
description: UncontrolledBattleBoard — game-shell composition with LOLO-driven sprite animation and combat effects; self-resolving auto-battle.

schema.name: ui-uncontrolled-battle-board
schema.description: UncontrolledBattleBoard — game-shell composition with LOLO-driven sprite animation and combat effects; self-resolving auto-battle.

emits.description: stepEvent prop — emitted each battle round with attack result
playAgainEvent prop — reset + restart the battle
tileClickEvent prop — emitted when a tile is clicked on the canvas
unitClickEvent prop — emitted when a unit is clicked on the canvas

events.name: Play Again
events.description: playAgainEvent prop — reset + restart the battle

events.name: Step
events.description: stepEvent prop — emitted each battle round with attack result

events.name: Tile Click
events.description: tileClickEvent prop — emitted when a tile is clicked on the canvas

events.name: Unit Click
events.description: unitClickEvent prop — emitted when a unit is clicked on the canvas

effects: Watch the units battle to the last one standing.

title.label: Title
title.description: Battle scenario title shown above the board.

description.default: Watch the units battle to the last one standing.
description.label: Description

initialUnits.label: Initial Units
initialUnits.description: Starting unit roster — each needs id, team (player|enemy), hp, atk, position.

assetManifest.label: Asset Manifest
assetManifest.description: Asset manifest with terrain, unit, feature, and effect sprite URLs.

frameCount.label: Frame count
frameCount.description: Number of sprite frames a unit cycles through before the animation loops.
